TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ma-e-ti-hu Ma-leiť¶¨ÁąĺŚúįŚ§ę ť¶¨Śąó == Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itini i likisi, ina Ma-e-ti-hu u ngangangan a kalepacawan nu kitidaan, nikahida kitidaan i In-tu-yen tada caculilan nu bayu, Ma-e-ti-hu biyaw u Se-li-lan-ka atu In-tu, nina tusaay a lalangawan atu pisiwbayan atu Ma-e-ti-hu u cacayay ku puna nu pinaay a se-cian, Ma-e-ti-hu tawya patahekal i tawya tu Ya-cuo nu Tun-huy dadipasan nu niyadu'an mala kalisiw nu piya' angangan nu lalekalan. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, . nikudan nu sabaw enem a seci, kabulawan nu binacada tayni, O-cuo tademaw yadah ku nipicalap i In-tu-yeng tu pacakayan a kitidaan, a hica sa kya haw ku Ma-e-ti-hu, sayaway maka tukuhay u Pu-taw-ya tademaw, kilul u He-lan tademaw atu Fa-kuo tademaw alahican mikanki tu itidaay a cen-ce, nu pinaay nu malaayaway tayda i O-cuo a nipikankian, itida i sabaw siwa a seci, Ma-e-ti-hu mala dadiputan nu Ing-kuo, Ing-kuo misuayaw tu Ma-e-ti-hu nu tapang a mikuwan, hemhemhan nuhen. 16 . Ma-e-ti-hu i caysiwsiwlim mihcaan miliyas tu Ing-kuo misiteked, alaw han, pisitekedan nina kanatal paA-tu-hun-cyaw a Kan-daw a kaygung sipabeli i Ing-kuo micukaymas katukuh i caysiwpicnem mihcaan, tawya Ing-kuo itida i caysiwpicnem mihcaan mamin a miliyas tu kaygung henay, tumian u kalepacaw hida satu a malingatu, u kanatal mimelaw namin tu wayway nu kaygung. hinisa ku Su-lin pabaliw pasayda i Ma-e-ti-hu micaliw tu kitidaan nu kaygung, nika caay pacaliwi nu Ma-e-ti-hu sihu. . Ma-e-ti-hu kun-he-kuo, itida i caysiwsiwsep mihcan misuayaw a milebu, u amelikay nu sakalahat a sakaudip atu aydaay a naculilan, patahkal tu kanatal a babutingan, sakaliwmah, laliwkuan a kawawan, Ma-e-ti-hu pangangan han u " alesan nu palutatengaan nu mita a tademaw a udu'an", " In-tu-yeng u sadikuday a kapahay nu kitidaan. uyni kuhan tada bangcalay tu ku hekal, ayda u Ma-e-ti-hu ka namuhan nu katuuda a mutayda midang, u Cung-kuo hina tayda i tida midang. duma satu u sapaayaw a kawawan, hatidaay tu nu dihekuay a demiad, sisa tapabaw ku bayu, kanahatu yadah ku San-hu subalan i Ma-e-ti-hu, sisa malabades a nipi'dis, uyniyan u sihu ku sayaway a misuayaw tina kawawan. . Ma-e-ti-hu i tusepsepsip mihcaan nika ninelan nu In-tu cumudan nu tabakiay a bayu milawpes, siwa tu ku a subalan ku caayay ka lawpes nu bayu, nu limpic a subalan mamin mapeci', enem a subalan ku malawpesay. tucay a tataydaan milabin nu aidangan cumudan nu tabakiay a bayu ma'dep, sakaudip tu nika sipunan makaala tu sepat yi min-yen, u sakasilaculan pulung han 62%, cayseptu a Ma-e-ti-hu tademaw atu enem nu hekalay a kanatal nu tademaw mapatay. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü napatahekal tu piya ku Ma-e-ti-hu saan ku likisi, u pida ku sausi tuydaan sa. siyen tusa a secian, uyni a subalan saan ku A-la-pu tademaw " kalisiw a subal". yu idaw henay ku misakalungay a zitay, ya Kanatul a Ma-e-ti-hu piya pataydaan nu heni i Huy-cuo. . u subal ku sausi tu Ma-e-ti-hu, enal a kitidaan madadecdec, kakulian, kaliwmaah nai' ku'puc. u pibutingan, pahikukian atu aaidangan u angaangangan nu sakaudip. i caysiwpicsep mihcaan inai' ku matinengay tu tataydaan kuyda tu aaidangan, ayda tu a mihcaan, nika lekalan tu nu lalaliwkuan midang, kataydaan midang nu kasilaculan nu kalisiw makaala tu binacadan a 28%, Ma-e-ti-hu nu namaka hekalay a nikaidaan tu kalisiwan a 60%, damsu nu sihu malakuuyt tu 90% namaka hekalay atu piliwkuan a damsu. uyni u Pan-tu a subal "Kurumba" tataydaan midang u Ma-e-ti-hu sayaway nu tataydaaan midang a kitidaan, itida i caysiwpictu mihcaan malingatu, masumad tu ku nikaudip nu Ma-e-ti-hu. itida i tusepsepwal mihcaan, Ma-e-tihu idaw tu ku walsiw a tataydaan midang, patideng tu 17,000 tu lalabina nu kakabian, tu mihmihcaan nu taydaay midan makaala tu enemsep wan a tademawan. Ma-e-ti-hu a tataydaan midang yu caysiwpictu mihcaan tusa a lalumaan yu mahida, i tusepseppic mihcaan macunus tu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa a lalumaan. Kurumba 92Śģ∂. lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Ma-e-ti-hu u Mu-se-lin kanatal. kapah ku nika sidikuc, tatayna anu tayda i patiyamay kanca asi tanayuay a hakama, tatama asi tanayuay a calapet. Ma-e-ti-hu amica ku nika siangangan nu subal a tataydaan, nika anu walesay sa inai' ku dikuc a mingaduy i Ma-e-ti-hu u sicumiay tu. . i kan tu nu lalanawan amiduduc tu kan nu Cin-cen-cya caay kan tu pabuy, kalang atu sipaduhay nu piyaan, hucu nu kan u nipahabay nu luma a tulakukan, sidi, ti'kuk atu buting. Cya-e-di-ya u sakay labang atu kakanen a kakanan, pasu kakanen u tenkaw, tubah atu nihudhudan tu padan a tuudan, kabi han u sanasay, tamanigi, kalu atu buting a kabian. . Ma-e-ti-hu a papalawan a lalangawan mapalalid nu Tung-hu lalangawan atu Na-ya lalangawan. BODUBERO u sanasay a kilangan a sangan nu tatuktukan, sapisalukiyaw nu tatuktukan. 24 Ma-lea u kacaledesan a demiadan. tukay nu picidekan u maacak ku puu' atu sengesengetan nu puu'an, namaka cacay a bulad, kasengetan nu demiad namaka lima a bulad katukuh tu sabaw tusa a dimiadan, caay ka hida nutaw a tukayan, untu nu Ma-lea mahidatu tu mihacan, mahidatu ku talakaw nu untu 30Ôĺü, sasabaay a untu 27Ôĺü. nika udad 1600 haw-mi. 1,600śĮęÁĪ≥.
S.PHON: == ma-…ô-ti-ńßu ma-r~…ĺ…ôi**** ** == r~…ĺikisi ** itini i r~…ĺikisi, ina ma-…ô-ti-ńßu u ŇčaŇčaŇčan a kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kitidaan, nikańßida kitidaan i in-tu-j…ôn tada ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu baju, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu bijaw u s…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺan-ka atu in-tu, nina tusaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pisiwbajan atu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu u ¶a ¶ajaj ku puna nu pinaaj a s…ô- ¶ian, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu tawja patańß…ôkar~…ĺ i tawja tu ja- ¶uo nu tun-ńßuj dadipasan nu nijadu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺa kar~…ĺisiw nu pija Ē~ ° aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. ***, . nikudan nu sabaw …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶i, kabur~…ĺawan nu bina ¶ada tajni, o- ¶uo tad…ômaw jadańß ku nipi ¶ar~…ĺap i in-tu-j…ôŇč tu pa ¶akajan a kitidaan, a ńßi ¶a sa kja ńßaw ku ma-…ô-ti-ńßu, sajawaj maka tukuńßaj u pu-taw-ja tad…ômaw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan tad…ômaw atu fa-kuo tad…ômaw ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mikanki tu itidaaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, nu pinaaj nu mar~…ĺaajawaj tajda i o- ¶uo a nipikankian, itida i sabaw siwa a s…ô ¶i, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu mar~…ĺa dadiputan nu iŇč-kuo, iŇč-kuo misuajaw tu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu nu tapaŇč a mikuwan, ńß…ômńß…ômńßan nuńß…ôn. ** . ma-…ô-ti-ńßu i ¶ajsiwsiwr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijas tu iŇč-kuo misit…ôk…ôd, ar~…ĺaw ńßan, pisit…ôk…ôdan nina kanatar~…ĺ paa-tu-ńßun- ¶jaw a kan-daw a kajguŇč sipab…ôr~…ĺi i iŇč-kuo mi ¶ukajmas katukuńß i ¶ajsiwpi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan, tawja iŇč-kuo itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan mamin a mir~…ĺijas tu kajguŇč ńß…ônaj, tumian u kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ńßida satu a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, u kanatar~…ĺ mim…ôr~…ĺaw namin tu wajwaj nu kajguŇč. ńßinisa ku su-r~…ĺin pabar~…ĺiw pasajda i ma-…ô-ti-ńßu mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kitidaan nu kajguŇč, nika ¶aaj pa ¶ar~…ĺiwi nu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu sińßu. . ma-…ô-ti-ńßu kun-ńß…ô-kuo, itida i ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp mińß ¶an misuajaw a mir~…ĺ…ôbu, u am…ôr~…ĺikaj nu sakar~…ĺańßat a sakaudip atu ajdaaj a na ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, patańßkar~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺ a babutiŇčan, sakar~…ĺiwmańß, r~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuan a kawawan, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu paŇčaŇčan ńßan u " ar~…ĺ…ôsan nu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan nu mita a tad…ômaw a udu Ē~ °an", " in-tu-j…ôŇč u sadikudaj a kapańßaj nu kitidaan. ujni kuńßan tada baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj tu ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ajda u ma-…ô-ti-ńßu ka namuńßan nu katuuda a mutajda midaŇč, u ¶uŇč-kuo ńßina tajda i tida midaŇč. duma satu u sapaajaw a kawawan, ńßatidaaj tu nu dińß…ôkuaj a d…ômiad, sisa tapabaw ku baju, kanańßatu jadańß ku san-ńßu subar~…ĺan i ma-…ô-ti-ńßu, sisa mar~…ĺabad…ôs a nipi Ē~ °dis, ujnijan u sińßu ku sajawaj a misuajaw tina kawawan. . ma-…ô-ti-ńßu i tus…ôps…ôpsip mińß ¶aan nika nin…ôr~…ĺan nu in-tu ¶umudan nu tabakiaj a baju mir~…ĺawp…ôs, siwa tu ku a subar~…ĺan ku ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺawp…ôs nu baju, nu r~…ĺimpi ¶ a subar~…ĺan mamin map…ô ¶i Ē~ °, …ôn…ôm a subar~…ĺan ku mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj. tu ¶aj a tatajdaan mir~…ĺabin nu aidaŇčan ¶umudan nu tabakiaj a baju ma Ē~ °d…ôp, sakaudip tu nika sipunan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpat ji min-j…ôn, u sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan **%, ¶ajs…ôptu a ma-…ô-ti-ńßu tad…ômaw atu …ôn…ôm nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw mapataj. . sakaudip ** napatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu pija ku ma-…ô-ti-ńßu saan ku r~…ĺikisi, u pida ku sausi tujdaan sa. sij…ôn tusa a s…ô ¶ian, ujni a subar~…ĺan saan ku a-r~…ĺa-pu tad…ômaw " kar~…ĺisiw a subar~…ĺ". ju idaw ńß…ônaj ku misakar~…ĺuŇčaj a zitaj, ja kanatur~…ĺ a ma-…ô-ti-ńßu pija patajdaan nu ńß…ôni i ńßuj- ¶uo. . u subar~…ĺ ku sausi tu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu, …ônar~…ĺ a kitidaan madad…ô ¶d…ô ¶, kakur~…ĺian, kar~…ĺiwmaańß nai Ē~ ° ku Ē~ °pu ¶. u pibutiŇčan, pańßikukian atu aaidaŇčan u aŇčaaŇčaŇčan nu sakaudip. i ¶ajsiwpi ¶s…ôp mińß ¶aan inai Ē~ ° ku matin…ôŇčaj tu tatajdaan kujda tu aaidaŇčan, ajda tu a mińß ¶aan, nika r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwkuan midaŇč, katajdaan midaŇč nu kasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺisiw makaar~…ĺa tu bina ¶adan a **%, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu nu namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a nikaidaan tu kar~…ĺisiwan a **%, damsu nu sińßu mar~…ĺakuujt tu **% namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu pir~…ĺiwkuan a damsu. ujni u pan-tu a subar~…ĺ "kurumba" tatajdaan midaŇč u ma-…ô-ti-ńßu sajawaj nu tatajdaaan midaŇč a kitidaan, itida i ¶ajsiwpi ¶tu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, masumad tu ku nikaudip nu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu. itida i tus…ôps…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan, ma-…ô-tińßu idaw tu ku war~…ĺsiw a tatajdaan midaŇč, patid…ôŇč tu **,*** tu r~…ĺar~…ĺabina nu kakabian, tu mińßmińß ¶aan nu tajdaaj midan makaar~…ĺa tu …ôn…ôms…ôp wan a tad…ômawan. ma-…ô-ti-ńßu a tatajdaan midaŇč ju ¶ajsiwpi ¶tu mińß ¶aan tusa a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan ju mańßida, i tus…ôps…ôppi ¶ mińß ¶aan ma ¶unus tu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan. kurumba ***. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ** ma-…ô-ti-ńßu u mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin kanatar~…ĺ. kapańß ku nika sidiku ¶, tatajna anu tajda i patijamaj kan ¶a asi tanajuaj a ńßakama, tatama asi tanajuaj a ¶ar~…ĺap…ôt. ma-…ô-ti-ńßu ami ¶a ku nika siaŇčaŇčan nu subar~…ĺ a tatajdaan, nika anu war~…ĺ…ôsaj sa inai Ē~ ° ku diku ¶ a miŇčaduj i ma-…ô-ti-ńßu u si ¶umiaj tu. . i kan tu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺanawan amidudu ¶ tu kan nu ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶ja ¶aaj kan tu pabuj, kar~…ĺaŇč atu sipaduńßaj nu pijaan, ńßu ¶u nu kan u nipańßabaj nu r~…ĺuma a tur~…ĺakukan, sidi, ti Ē~ °kuk atu butiŇč. ¶ja-…ô-di-ja u sakaj r~…ĺabaŇč atu kakan…ôn a kakanan, pasu kakan…ôn u t…ônkaw, tubańß atu nińßudńßudan tu padan a tuudan, kabi ńßan u sanasaj, tamanigi, kar~…ĺu atu butiŇč a kabian. . ma-…ô-ti-ńßu a papar~…ĺawan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu tuŇč-ńßu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu na-ja r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. bodub…ô*o u sanasaj a kir~…ĺaŇčan a saŇčan nu tatuktukan, sapisar~…ĺukijaw nu tatuktukan. ** ma-r~…ĺ…ôa u ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan a d…ômiadan. tukaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan u maa ¶ak ku puu Ē~ ° atu s…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇč…ôtan nu puu Ē~ °an, namaka ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad, kas…ôŇč…ôtan nu d…ômiad namaka r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad katukuńß tu sabaw tusa a dimiadan, ¶aaj ka ńßida nutaw a tukajan, untu nu ma-r~…ĺ…ôa mańßidatu tu mińßa ¶an, mańßidatu ku tar~…ĺakaw nu untu ***, sasabaaj a untu ***. nika udad **** ńßaw-mi. *,*****.
S.FORM: == Ma-e-ti-hu Ma-leiť¶¨ÁąĺŚúįŚ§ę ť¶¨Śąó == Likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itini i likisi, ina Ma-e-ti-hu u ngangangan a kalepacawan nu kitidaan, nikahida kitidaan i In-tu-yen tada caculilan nu bayu, Ma-e-ti-hu biyaw u Se-li-lan-ka atu In-tu, nina tusaay a lalangawan atu pisiwbayan atu Ma-e-ti-hu u cacayay ku puna nu pinaay a se-cian, Ma-e-ti-hu tawya patahekal i tawya tu Ya-cuo nu Tun-huy dadipasan nu niyadu'an mala kalisiw nu piya' angangan nu lalekalan. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, . nikudan nu sabaw enem a seci, kabulawan nu binacada tayni, O-cuo tademaw yadah ku nipicalap i In-tu-yeng tu pacakayan a kitidaan, a hica sa kya haw ku Ma-e-ti-hu, sayaway maka tukuhay u Pu-taw-ya tademaw, kilul u He-lan tademaw atu Fa-kuo tademaw alahican mikanki tu itidaay a cen-ce, nu pinaay nu malaayaway tayda i O-cuo a nipikankian, itida i sabaw siwa a seci, Ma-e-ti-hu mala dadiputan nu Ing-kuo, Ing-kuo misuayaw tu Ma-e-ti-hu nu tapang a mikuwan, hemhemhan nuhen. 16 . Ma-e-ti-hu i caysiwsiwlim mihcaan miliyas tu Ing-kuo misiteked, alaw han, pisitekedan nina kanatal paA-tu-hun-cyaw a Kan-daw a kaygung sipabeli i Ing-kuo micukaymas katukuh i caysiwpicnem mihcaan, tawya Ing-kuo itida i caysiwpicnem mihcaan mamin a miliyas tu kaygung henay, tumian u kalepacaw hida satu a malingatu, u kanatal mimelaw namin tu wayway nu kaygung. hinisa ku Su-lin pabaliw pasayda i Ma-e-ti-hu micaliw tu kitidaan nu kaygung, nika caay pacaliwi nu Ma-e-ti-hu sihu. . Ma-e-ti-hu kun-he-kuo, itida i caysiwsiwsep mihcan misuayaw a milebu, u amelikay nu sakalahat a sakaudip atu aydaay a naculilan, patahkal tu kanatal a babutingan, sakaliwmah, laliwkuan a kawawan, Ma-e-ti-hu pangangan han u " alesan nu palutatengaan nu mita a tademaw a udu'an", " In-tu-yeng u sadikuday a kapahay nu kitidaan. uyni kuhan tada bangcalay tu ku hekal, ayda u Ma-e-ti-hu ka namuhan nu katuuda a mutayda midang, u Cung-kuo hina tayda i tida midang. duma satu u sapaayaw a kawawan, hatidaay tu nu dihekuay a demiad, sisa tapabaw ku bayu, kanahatu yadah ku San-hu subalan i Ma-e-ti-hu, sisa malabades a nipi'dis, uyniyan u sihu ku sayaway a misuayaw tina kawawan. . Ma-e-ti-hu i tusepsepsip mihcaan nika ninelan nu In-tu cumudan nu tabakiay a bayu milawpes, siwa tu ku a subalan ku caayay ka lawpes nu bayu, nu limpic a subalan mamin mapeci', enem a subalan ku malawpesay. tucay a tataydaan milabin nu aidangan cumudan nu tabakiay a bayu ma'dep, sakaudip tu nika sipunan makaala tu sepat yi min-yen, u sakasilaculan pulung han 62%, cayseptu a Ma-e-ti-hu tademaw atu enem nu hekalay a kanatal nu tademaw mapatay. . sakaudip Á∂ďśŅü napatahekal tu piya ku Ma-e-ti-hu saan ku likisi, u pida ku sausi tuydaan sa. siyen tusa a secian, uyni a subalan saan ku A-la-pu tademaw " kalisiw a subal". yu idaw henay ku misakalungay a zitay, ya Kanatul a Ma-e-ti-hu piya pataydaan nu heni i Huy-cuo. . u subal ku sausi tu Ma-e-ti-hu, enal a kitidaan madadecdec, kakulian, kaliwmaah nai' ku'puc. u pibutingan, pahikukian atu aaidangan u angaangangan nu sakaudip. i caysiwpicsep mihcaan inai' ku matinengay tu tataydaan kuyda tu aaidangan, ayda tu a mihcaan, nika lekalan tu nu lalaliwkuan midang, kataydaan midang nu kasilaculan nu kalisiw makaala tu binacadan a 28%, Ma-e-ti-hu nu namaka hekalay a nikaidaan tu kalisiwan a 60%, damsu nu sihu malakuuyt tu 90% namaka hekalay atu piliwkuan a damsu. uyni u Pan-tu a subal "Kurumba" tataydaan midang u Ma-e-ti-hu sayaway nu tataydaaan midang a kitidaan, itida i caysiwpictu mihcaan malingatu, masumad tu ku nikaudip nu Ma-e-ti-hu. itida i tusepsepwal mihcaan, Ma-e-tihu idaw tu ku walsiw a tataydaan midang, patideng tu 17,000 tu lalabina nu kakabian, tu mihmihcaan nu taydaay midan makaala tu enemsep wan a tademawan. Ma-e-ti-hu a tataydaan midang yu caysiwpictu mihcaan tusa a lalumaan yu mahida, i tusepseppic mihcaan macunus tu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa a lalumaan. Kurumba 92Śģ∂. lalangaw śĖáŚĆĖ Ma-e-ti-hu u Mu-se-lin kanatal. kapah ku nika sidikuc, tatayna anu tayda i patiyamay kanca asi tanayuay a hakama, tatama asi tanayuay a calapet. Ma-e-ti-hu amica ku nika siangangan nu subal a tataydaan, nika anu walesay sa inai' ku dikuc a mingaduy i Ma-e-ti-hu u sicumiay tu. . i kan tu nu lalanawan amiduduc tu kan nu Cin-cen-cya caay kan tu pabuy, kalang atu sipaduhay nu piyaan, hucu nu kan u nipahabay nu luma a tulakukan, sidi, ti'kuk atu buting. Cya-e-di-ya u sakay labang atu kakanen a kakanan, pasu kakanen u tenkaw, tubah atu nihudhudan tu padan a tuudan, kabi han u sanasay, tamanigi, kalu atu buting a kabian. . Ma-e-ti-hu a papalawan a lalangawan mapalalid nu Tung-hu lalangawan atu Na-ya lalangawan. BODUBERO u sanasay a kilangan a sangan nu tatuktukan, sapisalukiyaw nu tatuktukan. 24 Ma-lea u kacaledesan a demiadan. tukay nu picidekan u maacak ku puu' atu sengesengetan nu puu'an, namaka cacay a bulad, kasengetan nu demiad namaka lima a bulad katukuh tu sabaw tusa a dimiadan, caay ka hida nutaw a tukayan, untu nu Ma-lea mahidatu tu mihacan, mahidatu ku talakaw nu untu 30Ôĺü, sasabaay a untu 27Ôĺü. nika udad 1600 haw-mi. 1,600śĮęÁĪ≥.

baju, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu bijaw u s…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺan-ka atu in-tu, nina tusaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pisiwbajan atu ma-…ô-ti-ńßu u ¶a ¶ajaj ku puna nu pinaaj a s…ô- ¶ian, ma-…ô-ti-ńßu tawja patańß…ôkar~…ĺ i
